Bash(python tools/vikunja_cli.py comment shellenv-26 "Refresh action \(F key\) implemented in display_main_tui. Bash(python tools/vikunja_cli.py comment shellenv-27 "Init action \(I key\) implemented in display_main_tui. Calls subprocess.run\(['shellenv', 'init', '--family', family, '--yes']\), then suspends curses and waits for Enter before restoring.")
Bash(python tools/vikunja_cli.py create "Fix git not found when PATH is stripped in init/init-repo" --priority medium)

Bash(python tools/vikunja_cli.py comment shellenv-28 "shutil.which\('git'\) also returns None when PATH is stripped \(e.g. env - uv run shellenv\). Fixed by resolving git at import time with fallback to /usr/bin/git, /usr/local/bin/git, /opt/homebrew/bin/git.")
